title: Studio Access Protocol
purpose: Define how personnel enter and use studio spaces.
scope: Applies to Spotlight Advocate staff and authorized contractors on production days.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: Define how personnel enter and use studio spaces.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.body: Applies to Spotlight Advocate staff and authorized contractors on production days.

sections.heading: Definitions
sections.body:
Studio — a controlled production space managed by Spotlight Advocate.
Authorized personnel — staff or contractors with current access approval.

sections.heading: Responsibilities
sections.body:
Studio Manager — controls access lists and day-of entry.
Personnel — follow check-in and safety rules while on site.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body: Replace this section with the first substantive clause.

sections.heading: Exceptions
sections.body: Emergency access may be granted by the Studio Manager and must be logged the same day.

sections.heading: References
sections.body: Related: production safety guidelines; contractor onboarding checklist.

revision_history.author: Spotlight Advocate
revision_history.notes: Renumbered from SA-101 into Operations band SA-200–299.

revision_history.notes: Normalized to standard section order; added table component example.
